title: Savory Smoky French Cheese Souffle
description: A rich and energizing French dish featuring shallots and lardons, with a nutty cheese pull, this souffle is a perfect dinner option. It is kosher-friendly and made with high-quality ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat and add the chopped shallots, cooking until they are softened.
Add the flour to the saucepan and stir to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Slowly add the milk to the saucepan, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it thickens, stirring occasionally.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the grated cheese until it is melted and smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the egg mixture to the cheese mixture and stir to combine.
Gently fold in the rendered lardons.
Pour the mixture into a buttered souffle dish and smooth the top.
Bake the souffle for 25-30 minutes, or until it is puffed and golden brown.
